Kami are [[Transapients]] in a state of [[nobility]]. They are a product of either [[apotheosis]] of [[Sapients]], or [[rehabilitation]] of [[oni]].<ref>https://evolution.faith/the-paths-of-ascension/</ref>

It comes from the notion of [[The Continuous Cosmos]] and is somewhat satirical

== Metaphorical use ==
As with the term [[oni]] the term Kami is often used metaphorically in the [[21st century]] to refer to powerful humans in a state of [[nobility]] with heroic implications. The reasoning behind this is that until [[Transapients]] properly come into existence in [[Terragen civilization]] these humans are the closest thing to Kami, and they are role models for future Kami to follow

== See Also ==

* [[archai]]

== References ==
[[Category:Transapients]]
[[sn:Kami]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
